description_long: This is a full drum kit composed of several cylindrical drums and three cymbals, all constructed from what appears to be corrugated cardboard and paper. The drums have ribbed, brown bodies with visible seams and are supported by simple, angular stands that mimic metal but are also made from cardboard. The cymbals are circular, flat, and slightly textured, with a pale beige color and a corrugated edge, mounted on tripod stands. The kit includes a bass drum, a snare drum, and at least one tom, each with visible tension rods and lugs crafted from the same cardboard material. The stands have black, flat feet for stability, and the overall construction is lightweight and somewhat whimsical, suggesting a handmade or artistic interpretation of a traditional drum set. There are no visible brand markings, electronics, or additional accessories, and the surfaces show no signs of wear or damage.
description: A cardboard drum kit with ribbed brown drums and pale beige cymbals on tripod stands, all crafted from corrugated cardboard and paper. The set is lightweight, handmade, and visually mimics a traditional drum kit.
description_view_0: This view shows the full drum kit from above, highlighting the arrangement of the drums and cymbals, with all stands and drum heads clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the front and left side of the kit, showing the bass drum and snare drum heads, as well as the structure of the cymbal stands.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the backs of the drums and the underside of the cymbals, with the ribbed texture of the drum shells and the tripod bases of the stands in focus.
description_view_3: This side view displays the rightmost drums and cymbals, with the corrugated edges and the angular construction of the stands more prominent.
